header.label: Career & Education
header.title: Journey.
header.description: Advancing AI through engineering excellence and academic research, from multimodal biomedical datasets to on-device agentic systems.

items.description: Speech & AI Agent components for VinFast's virtual assistant.
achievements: Engineered performance optimizations for real-time driver interactions.
Architecting offline SLM deployment on Qualcomm-based vehicle hardware.
Optimizing system design for high-reliability without cloud dependency.

items.description: AI-Powered Insight Automation & Sun* Assistant project.
achievements: Architected high-throughput inference pipeline (Whisper + vLLM) reducing processing time by 65%.
Engineered GraphRAG indexing system using advanced parsing & chunking mechanisms.
Implemented AI Agents with persistent memory reducing staff inquiries by 70%.

items.logoAlt: VNU University of Engineering and Technology logo
items.description: Leading research on drug-drug interaction extraction using multimodal approaches.
achievements: Authored 3 peer-reviewed publications, including ACM Multimedia (A*) and JBI (Q1).
Established a new Multimodal Biomedical Dataset (MUDI).
Best Thesis Award from Thesis Defense Committee (Score: 9.7/10).

items.description: Robust Table Structure Detection & Clinical Data Extraction.
achievements: Improved table reconstruction accuracy by 27% for partially missing borders.
Fine-tuned models for clinical data extraction from unstructured health records.
Collaborated on practical AI solutions for international clients.

items.degree: Master 2 in Data, Knowledge and Hybrid AI
items.details: Incoming student. Admitted to the this prestigious Master 2 program at Université Paris-Saclay.

header.label: Project Portfolio
header.title: Featured Projects.
header.description: A selection of technical projects ranging from real-time agentic systems to specialized model optimization and translation.

items.title: AI Voice Chat Assistant
items.description: Low-latency conversational AI featuring real-time voice synthesis and multi-agent workflows using LangGraph and MCP.
achievements: Integrated Superlinked for high-dimensional vector embeddings.
Architected multi-turn dialogue handling with persistent memory.
Optimized for real-time interactive response rates.

items.title: Laos-Viet Translation Model
items.description: High-accuracy translation system improving BLEU score by 36% from baseline. Awarded Best NLP Class Project.
achievements: Customized Transformer architecture for low-resource language pairs.
Crawled and processed public data to expand the training corpus.
Implemented advanced decoding strategies to improve translation quality.

items.title: Image Generation using GAN
items.description: Re-implemented GAN from scratch with advanced training methods, achieving 20% faster convergence.
achievements: Reduced training epochs by 20% using advanced optimization.
Achieved FID score of 0.0285.
Conducted thorough ablation studies on architecture components.

items.title: Model Compression
items.description: Reduced VGG16 model size by 76% with minimal error increase using quantization and pruning.
achievements: Achieved significant size reduction for edge deployment.
Maintained top-5 error within 0.0586 margin.
Evaluated performance across various pruning ratios.

header.label: Scholarly Archive
header.title: Publications & Research
header.description: Exploring the intersection of multimodal intelligence and complex biological systems through peer-reviewed academic rigor.

items.title: MUDI: A Multimodal Biomedical Dataset for Understanding Pharmacodynamic Drug-Drug Interactions
items.description: Establishing a new Multimodal Biomedical Dataset (MUDI) and proposing diverse multimodal fusion strategies for Drug-Drug Interaction extraction. Presented at the top-tier 33rd ACM International Conference on Multimedia.

items.title: Comprehensive Analysis of Multimodal Drug-Drug Interaction Extraction Using Diverse Fusion Strategies
items.description: Published in the Journal of Biomedical Informatics. A deep dive into attention-based and multimodal fusion techniques for identifying complex pharmacological interactions.

items.title: Improving Drug-Drug Interaction Extraction from Biomedical Literature using Deep Multimodal Fusion
items.description: Oral presentation at BME 2024. Focused on leveraging deep multimodal fusion to enhance the accuracy of DDI extraction from unstructured scientific text.

items.description: Awarded Second Prize among top research projects across all faculties for work on multimodal drug-drug interaction prediction.

items.title: International Quant Championship

items.title: VPBank Hackathon Technology
items.description: Top 5 in the Talent Acquisition Search Application Challenge using RAG and customized LLM pipelines.
Led a team to develop a system generating documents and slides from concepts, reducing workload by 98%. Top 10 finish.
Delivered lectures on deep learning concepts to first-year students and mentored soil moisture estimation projects.
Managed social media campaigns and organized large-scale student events, boosting reach by 10% annually.
Selected as one of 40 excellent students to attend this national-level conference on digital transformation.
